home.hero_title: The concierge that cares for your pet
home.hero_subtitle: A bespoke service, throughout France. Dogs, cats and exotic pets entrusted to certified professionals.
home.hero_subtitle_detail: Ultra-personalised pet services across France: sitting, walking, grooming, transport, behaviour and wellness, and much more…
home.services_subtitle: Every pet is unique, and so is every one of our services.
home.service_garde_domicile_desc: Your dog stays in their environment. A certified petsitter comes to your home.
home.service_garde_nuit_desc: Three options to suit you — at yours, at your petsitter's or at a family kennel.
home.service_visite_chat_desc: Home visits, sitting at yours or your petsitter's, feline boarding.
home.service_comportement_desc: Professional trainers & behaviourists to support you.
home.service_toilettage_desc: Home or salon grooming, nail trimming, spa treatments.
home.service_transport_desc: Comfortable trips and travels with our licensed drivers.
home.process_step1_desc: Tell us everything about your furry one — pet type, service needed, dates and address.
home.process_step2_desc: We find the best petsitters in our network. Bear with us — it takes between 24 and 48 hours.
home.process_step3_desc: We come back with a personalised selection. You choose, we handle the rest.
home.testimonials_title: They trust us with what they hold most dear.
home.newsletter_subtitle: Our newsletter delivers pet care tips and expert advice from our community of animal health and wellbeing specialists.
home.promos_subtitle: Deals negotiated with our handpicked partners — food, health, accessories and more.
home.cta_subtitle: Join the families who trust Petcheri for their pet's happiness.
home.service_dogsitting_desc: Day care, overnight sitting at yours or your dogsitter's, family boarding.
home.service_promenade_desc: City or forest walks, solo or in group, tailored to your dog's needs.
home.service_autres_desc: Solutions for international travel, deliveries and additional services.

faq.label: Frequently asked questions
faq.title: We answer everything
faq.a1: Every petsitter goes through a rigorous vetting process: individual interview, identity check, reference check, and a supervised trial period. All are insured.
faq.q2: What happens if there's a problem during a service?
faq.a2: Our team is available 7 days a week by phone and WhatsApp. In case of a veterinary emergency, we have a dedicated protocol. Insurance covers vet fees and any damages.
faq.q3: Can I cancel or modify a booking?
faq.a3: Yes, cancellation is free up to 48 hours before the service. Between 48h and 24h, a 50% fee applies. Date changes are always possible subject to your petsitter's availability.
faq.q4: Is Petcheri available in my city?
faq.a4: Petcheri operates across all of France. Fill in the form and we'll quickly let you know if we can help with a petsitter near you!
faq.a5: The prices shown are indicative starting prices. The final price depends on duration, number of pets, specific needs and location. You receive a detailed quote before any confirmation — no commitment, no surprises.
faq.q6: Is my pet insured during the service?
faq.a6: Yes, all pets are covered by our insurance during services.

services_chien.meta_description: Sitting, walking, grooming, training and transport — ultra-personalised services for your dog across France.

services_chien.svcs_subtitle: We find the perfect solution — whatever service you need.
services_chien.svc_garde_jour_desc: Personalised day care tailored to your dog's needs and yours.
services_chien.svc_garde_nuit_desc: Bespoke overnight care when you go on holiday — at yours or at a family boarder's.
services_chien.svc_promenade_desc: Forest or city walks, group or solo, tailored to your dog's needs.
services_chien.svc_toilettage_desc: Salon or mobile grooming for a perfect coat and a happy dog.
services_chien.svc_comportement_desc: Certified behaviourists and trainers specialising in positive reinforcement.
services_chien.svc_bienetre_desc: Give your dog the benefit of expert animal wellness methods.
services_chien.svc_transport_desc: Comfortable trips and travel with approved drivers and maximum safety.
services_chien.svc_voyage_desc: Travelling with your dog? Need admin help? We have the solution.

services_chat.meta_description: Home visits, sitting, grooming, training and wellness — personalised services for your cat. Specialist feline petsitters.
services_chat.hero_subtitle: Sitting, grooming, training, wellness and transport — a complete concierge at the service of your discerning feline.
services_chat.svcs_title: A complete concierge for your cat
services_chat.svcs_subtitle: From sitting to wellness, we take care of everything your cat needs — even what they haven't asked for yet.
services_chat.svc_visite_desc: Home visit, sitting at yours or in a foster home — tailored to your cat's habits and your constraints.
services_chat.svc_toilettage_desc: Deep brushing, delicate trim, eye and ear cleaning, nails — by specialist cat groomers.
services_chat.svc_comport_desc: Is your cat scratching furniture, panicking at sounds or refusing to share space? Our behaviourists have the answers.

services_chat.svc_transport_desc: Trip to the vet, groomer or a friend's — our pet drivers transport your cat in complete safety.
services_chat.banner_title: Your cat has standards. We have the petsitters.

services_nac.meta_description: Rabbits, rodents, reptiles, birds — specialist care for all exotic pets, covered by AXA insurance.
services_nac.hero_subtitle: Rabbits, reptiles, birds, fish — our petsitters trained in exotic species care for your companions with the same expertise as for dogs and cats.
services_nac.svcs_subtitle: Improvising with a reptile or rabbit is not an option. Our specialist carers know the specific needs of each species.
services_nac.svc_visite_desc: A specialist carer visits your home to feed your pet, clean their habitat (cage, terrarium, aquarium) and ensure their wellbeing. Your exotic pet stays in their familiar environment.
services_nac.svc_garde_dom_desc: A carer moves into your home for the full duration of your absence. Continuous presence and care for animals requiring special attention.
services_nac.svc_garde_chez_desc: Your exotic pet is hosted by a specialist equipped for the species. Ideal for animals that adapt well to travel.
services_nac.svc_transport_desc: Trips to the vet, specialist or during a house move — in complete safety, with precautions adapted to each species.
services_nac.svc_soins_desc: Routine care, habitat maintenance, behavioural monitoring and access to our specialist exotic pet partner vets if needed.
services_nac.cta_card_desc: Contact us — we almost certainly have the right carer for you.
services_nac.banner_title: Your exotic pet deserves care that matches their uniqueness
services_nac.banner_subtitle: Trained specialists, available vets, insurance included. Petcheri — for extraordinary animals too.

garde_chien.meta_description: Home sitting, day care, overnight or family boarding — bespoke solutions for every dog, covered by AXA insurance.
garde_chien.hero_subtitle: We adapt to your dog — age, size, needs and fears. Professional or personal sitters, at home or theirs, across France.
garde_chien.options_subtitle: Tell us all about your dog and we'll offer a 100% bespoke sitting solution.
garde_chien.opt_jour_desc: Away for a day or a few hours? We pamper your dog just the way they like!
garde_chien.opt_jour_d1: At home or at your sitter's
garde_chien.opt_nuit_desc: Off on holiday? We'll arrange a five-star stay with the perfect carer!
garde_chien.opt_dom_desc: Your dog is more comfortable at home? We find a trusted carer to look after them there.
garde_chien.opt_pension_desc: Your dog dreams of a weekend with new friends? Give them a cosy family boarding stay!
garde_chien.banner_title: Find the perfect sitter for your dog
garde_chien.banner_subtitle: In just a few minutes, we identify the certified petsitter best suited to your animal.

garde_journee.meta_description: Dog day care at home or at your sitter's — express (1 h), half day (4 h) or full day (8 h+), with photo updates.
garde_journee.hero_subtitle: Whether you are at work or have a full day ahead, our certified petsitters look after your dog with the same care as at home.
garde_journee.formules_title: À la carte, to suit your needs
garde_journee.formules_subtitle: Whether you're out for an hour or all day, we have the right option. No commitment, bookable in a few clicks.
garde_journee.form_express_desc: A carer pops round to feed your dog, play with them and take them out. Perfect for breaking up long hours alone.
garde_journee.form_demijournee_desc: Sitting at yours or your sitter's, morning or afternoon. Perfect for moderately busy days.
garde_journee.form_journee_desc: Your dog is welcomed for the whole day in a warm, homely setting. They come home happy and tired — so will you!
garde_journee.inclus_title: A transparent service from start to finish
garde_journee.inclus_subtitle: Every service follows a strict protocol personally overseen by our concierges.
garde_journee.inclus_1: Walk report with photos at every visit
garde_journee.inclus_4: Monitored by our concierges and partner vets
garde_journee.inclus_5: Secure booking and payment via the Petcheri app
garde_journee.banner_title: Your dog deserves the best possible day
garde_journee.banner_subtitle: Our petsitters are available 7 days a week across France. Find yours in just a few minutes.

garde_nuit.meta_description: Evening, overnight or weekend care at home or at your petsitter's. Daily updates and AXA insurance.
garde_nuit.hero_subtitle: Dinner out, business trip or romantic weekend? Your dog is in safe hands. Our certified petsitters provide a reassuring overnight presence — at home or in their own.
garde_nuit.formules_subtitle: An evening, one night or a full weekend — the option adapts to your plans, not the other way round.
garde_nuit.form_soiree_desc: A carer stays at yours or hosts your dog for the evening. Perfect for a restaurant dinner or a show, worry-free.
garde_nuit.form_nuit_desc: Your dog sleeps in a warm home or stays at yours with an overnight carer. They wake up rested, not alone.
garde_nuit.form_weekend_desc: You deserve a break. Hand your dog over for the weekend and leave with a clear head. Our carers take care of everything.
garde_nuit.reassurance_title: You leave. They stay. Everyone's happy.
garde_nuit.reassurance_subtitle: No cage, no kennel: your dog lives in a warm home or stays in their own environment with someone by their side.
garde_nuit.rea_photos_desc: Your carer sends you regular news throughout.
garde_nuit.rea_axa_desc: Professional insurance up to €9,000,000 on every service.
garde_nuit.rea_urgence_desc: A team available 7 days a week for any question or unexpected issue.
garde_nuit.banner_title: Leave with peace of mind — your dog is in good hands
garde_nuit.banner_subtitle: Certified petsitters across France, available 7 days a week. Book in minutes.

garde_chat.meta_description: Home visits or cat sitting — respectful of your cat's territory and habits. Certified petsitters, AXA insurance.
garde_chat.hero_subtitle: Cats hate change. Our specialist petsitters come to your home, respect their habits and make sure they feel truly comfortable.
garde_chat.formules_title: Matched to their personality and your needs
garde_chat.formules_subtitle: Some cats barely tolerate having their cushion moved. Others jump on any newcomer's lap. We have a solution for both.
garde_chat.form_visite_desc: A carer pops round each day to feed your cat, clean the litter, play and cuddle. Your feline stays in their universe — their space, their routines, their landmarks.
garde_chat.form_visite_ideal: Ideal for homebody or anxious cats
garde_chat.form_garde_dom_desc: A carer moves into yours for the full duration of your absence. Non-stop presence, cuddles and care for cats that need extended company.
garde_chat.form_garde_chez_desc: Your cat is welcomed into a cat-friendly home — dedicated space, toys and personalised attention. For felines that adapt well to new environments.
garde_chat.form_pension_desc: Our boarding partners offer dedicated spaces, cosy beds, toys and near-permanent human presence. The palace for your puss.
garde_chat.form_btn: Find a carer for my cat
garde_chat.inclus_subtitle: Every visit or sit follows a precise protocol. Nothing is left to chance — especially meal time.
garde_chat.inclus_1: Feeding according to your cat's habits
garde_chat.inclus_6: Access to a partner vet if needed
garde_chat.banner_title: Your cat deserves the best possible care
garde_chat.banner_subtitle: Specialist feline petsitters, selected by our behaviourists. Leave with complete peace of mind.

comportement_education.meta_description: Positive training, behaviour assessment, re-education for dogs and cats — by certified behaviourists. AXA insurance included.
comportement_education.hero_subtitle: Getting professional help is not a failure — it is an investment in harmony and understanding between you and your pet.
comportement_education.dog_subtitle: Whether you want to address a behavioural issue, train a puppy or socialise your dog — we have the right solution.
comportement_education.sol_troubles_desc: Does your pet show problematic behaviour? Our professional trainers and behaviourists help you understand what your pet is trying to express.
comportement_education.sol_chiot_desc: Welcoming a new pet can raise many questions. A professional will help you prepare their arrival and ensure harmonious cohabitation.
comportement_education.sol_groupe_desc: Great for socialising your pet, group lessons combine theory and practice using positive methods. Communication activities between dogs and humans.
comportement_education.sol_promenade_desc: Helping your dog better navigate their environment and its surprises. Forest or city walks depending on the challenges to address.
comportement_education.cat_title: Feline behaviourists exist for exactly this
comportement_education.cat_subtitle: Aggression, excessive meowing, litter issues… cats express stress in their own way. Our specialists identify the causes and restore harmony to the whole household.
comportement_education.why_1_desc: Our behaviourists favour methods respectful of animal welfare — no coercion, no punishment.
comportement_education.why_2_desc: Every animal is unique. Our experts build an action plan tailored to your specific situation.
comportement_education.why_3_desc: Our behaviourists and trainers are selected for their training, professionalism and gentleness.
comportement_education.why_4_desc: Every session is covered by our professional insurance for your peace of mind.
comportement_education.banner_title: Ready to find harmony with your pet?
comportement_education.banner_subtitle: Simple conditioning can make all the difference in your relationship with your companion.

toilettage.meta_description: Mobile or salon grooming for dogs and cats — bath, trim, nails, spa. Professional groomers selected by Petcheri.
toilettage.hero_subtitle: Mobile grooming or salon — our certified groomers take care of your dog or cat with expertise and gentleness.
toilettage.dog_subtitle: Every dog that lives life to the full needs regular washing. Give your dog the bath and care they deserve!
toilettage.dog_soin_desc: A trim combined with professional treatments and carefully selected quality care products.
toilettage.dog_bain_desc: A proper bath and brush — your dog will come out transformed, immaculate from nose to paw.
toilettage.dog_brossage_desc: Special brush to remove dead hair and penetrate the undercoat for a gloriously shiny coat.
toilettage.dog_coupe_desc: From the most classic to the most creative cut — our groomers' expertise brings out your dog's best.
toilettage.dog_patticure_desc: Trimming and filing the nails, essential for the health and comfort of your fluffy friend.
toilettage.dog_tonte_desc: For specific areas needing a trim or long-haired dogs prone to matting.
toilettage.cat_subtitle: Cats may be great self-groomers, but they sometimes need professional help. Mobile or 100% cat-friendly salon.
toilettage.cat_coupe_desc: Precise trim to ensure your cat's comfort and prevent accidental scratches.
toilettage.cat_brossage_desc: Removes dead hair, detangles knots and keeps the coat soft, shiny and healthy.
toilettage.cat_tonte_desc: Targeted clipping for problem areas — ideal for long hair or around sensitive zones.
toilettage.cat_nettoyage_desc: Removes impurities and refreshes the coat while respecting your cat's sensitive skin.
toilettage.cat_yeux_desc: Careful treatment to prevent infections and maintain good hygiene for your feline.
toilettage.cat_royal_desc: The most complete care: professional treatments and carefully selected quality products.
toilettage.why_title: Quality care for a thriving pet
toilettage.why_2: Groomers selected for professionalism and gentleness
toilettage.why_3: Wide range of options to suit your pet's needs
toilettage.banner_title: Give your pet the care they deserve
toilettage.banner_subtitle: Our professional groomers come to you or welcome you in salon — your choice.

transport.meta_description: Vet trips, holiday transport, airport transfers — professional pet transport across France, covered by AXA.
transport.hero_subtitle: Vet appointments, trips, airport transfers — our approved drivers transport your pet with the utmost care.
transport.dest_title: All destinations, one point of contact
transport.dest_subtitle: From the vet to a house move, our carers handle the journey so you don't have to.
transport.dest_veto_desc: Consultation, emergency or post-op follow-up — your pet is driven and collected by a carer who knows our partner practices.
transport.dest_toiletteur_desc: No need to take time off to drop your pet at the groomer. We handle the round trip.
transport.dest_famille_desc: Is your pet spending the weekend at a friend's or family member's? We handle both journeys, worry-free.
transport.dest_pension_desc: Drop-off and pick-up at a boarding facility or your carer's — without you needing to travel.
transport.dest_demenagement_desc: Moving is always stressful for your pet. Our transporters adapt the journey to their pace.
transport.dest_mesure_desc: Any transport request not listed here can be handled by our concierge — contact us to discuss.
transport.gar_subtitle: A stressful journey can affect your pet for hours. Our carer-drivers are trained to make the experience as smooth as possible.
transport.gar_1: Vehicles adapted and secured for each species
transport.gar_2: Certified carers trained in pet transport
transport.gar_4: Photo report before and after the trip
transport.gar_6: Available 7 days a week, including weekends and public holidays
transport.banner_title: Your pet deserves a journey as smooth as the destination
transport.banner_subtitle: Book a transport in minutes. Our pet drivers are available 7 days a week across France.

bien_etre.meta_description: Massage, osteopathy, reiki, naturopathy, hydrotherapy — alternative therapies for your pet's physical and emotional wellbeing.
bien_etre.hero_subtitle: Beyond sitting and grooming, Petcheri offers alternative therapies for your pet's deep wellbeing. Certified practitioners, selected by our partner vets, at home or in salon.
bien_etre.soins_subtitle: Every treatment is delivered by a certified practitioner, validated by our committee of partner vets and behaviourists.
bien_etre.soin_massage_desc: Through precise and compassionate techniques, massage promotes physical and emotional balance in your pet. Ideal for stressed, painful or convalescing animals.
bien_etre.soin_osteo_desc: A gentle therapy that harnesses the body's natural self-healing capacity. Applicable to all vertebrates — dogs, cats, rabbits, horses — to relieve tension and pain.
bien_etre.soin_reiki_desc: An energy healing technique using hand placement, aimed at reducing stress and emotional pain. Particularly beneficial for anxious or traumatised animals.
bien_etre.soin_naturo_desc: A natural, non-invasive approach: aromatherapy, homeopathy, phytotherapy, dietary supplements. Holistic support for vitality and prevention.
bien_etre.soin_algues_desc: Marine treatments rich in minerals that promote muscle relaxation, circulation and skin regeneration. A true spa for your companion.
bien_etre.soin_hydro_desc: Water-based care to reduce pain, strengthen muscles and aid recovery after injury or surgery. Recommended by our partner vets.
bien_etre.soin_thalasso_desc: Dead Sea clay wraps for skin regeneration and essential mineral intake. A complete treatment for coat and skin.
bien_etre.soin_proprio_desc: Body awareness sessions strengthening deep muscles and balance. Ideal for prevention, rehabilitation or sporting dogs.
bien_etre.when_title: Your pet is speaking. You just need to listen.
bien_etre.when_subtitle: Wellness care is not only for sick animals. It is part of a preventive and compassionate approach to animal care.
bien_etre.selection_title: Not just anyone touches your animal
bien_etre.selection_subtitle: Every wellness practitioner is assessed by our veterinary committee before joining the Petcheri network. Qualifications, references, behavioural interview — our selection process is as rigorous as for our petsitters.
bien_etre.banner_title: Give your pet the care they truly deserve
bien_etre.banner_subtitle: Certified practitioners, a compassionate approach and visible results. Book a wellness session today.

qui_sommes_nous.meta_description: Discover Petcheri: a premium pet concierge, {sittersNetwork}+ certified petsitters, AXA insurance. Featured in Gala, Europe 1, Purina and more.
qui_sommes_nous.hero_subtitle: Petcheri is a concierge created by and for pet owners, built to deliver personalised services as close as possible to the needs of each client and their animal — guided by 4 core values: Trust, Excellence, Transparency and Safety.
qui_sommes_nous.histoire_title: The story of Mélanie and Malka
qui_sommes_nous.histoire_p1: Petcheri is Mélanie's story — a dog mum who made all the wrong choices so that you don't have to!
qui_sommes_nous.histoire_p2: Back in France after years in the United States, she could not find a reliable solution to have her dog Malka looked after during long days at the office.
qui_sommes_nous.histoire_p3: After several unfortunate experiences, she decided to create a concierge that would deliver a quality of service matching the love we have for our animals.
qui_sommes_nous.histoire_quote: Our goal is to revolutionise pet services in France not quantitatively but qualitatively: we are passionate about changing mindsets around animal welfare.
qui_sommes_nous.histoire_floating_quote: Created by animal lovers, for animal lovers.
qui_sommes_nous.values_subtitle: They guide every hire, every service, every decision. Without compromise.
qui_sommes_nous.val_confiance_desc: Every petsitter is selected after a rigorous process overseen by animal behaviourists and vets.
qui_sommes_nous.val_excellence_desc: We personally ensure that every service is carried out according to our quality standards.
qui_sommes_nous.val_transparence_desc: Photos, walk reports, real-time updates — you always know what your animal is experiencing.
qui_sommes_nous.val_securite_desc: All our service providers benefit from our AXA professional insurance for your peace of mind.
qui_sommes_nous.network_title: Petsitters selected with the greatest care
qui_sommes_nous.network_p1: Our petsitters are selected through a very rigorous recruitment process overseen by behaviourists and vets. We test their skills, verify their experience and their genuine love of animals.
qui_sommes_nous.network_p2: 80% are certified sector professionals (carers, vet nurses, behaviourists…) and 20% are non-professionals or in training with several years of proven experience.
qui_sommes_nous.award_1_desc: Winners of the Pépites du Tech competition, recognising France's most innovative tech startups.
qui_sommes_nous.award_2_title: 1st prize Pet Tech — Purina by Nestlé
qui_sommes_nous.award_2_desc: First prize in the Pet Tech competition organised by Purina by Nestlé, distinguishing the most promising animal welfare solutions.
qui_sommes_nous.press_marie_claire_quote: "Tout Pour Le Toutou", the best services dedicated to all those who love their pets
qui_sommes_nous.press_gala_quote: Concierge service for our furry companions
qui_sommes_nous.press_luxury_quote: "Tout Pour Le Toutou": Revolutionising Pet Services in France
qui_sommes_nous.banner_title: Are you a professional or an animal lover?
qui_sommes_nous.banner_subtitle: Join our network of petsitters and do what you love while helping pet owners.

vip_club.meta_title: The VIP Club — Very Important Pet — Petcheri
vip_club.meta_description: The Very Important Pet Club by Petcheri: exclusive events, wellness workshops, personalised gifts and meetings between passionate members.
vip_club.hero_desc: The Very Important Pet Club by Petcheri is on a mission to promote animal wellbeing through exclusive events, workshops and meetings with sector experts.
vip_club.benefits_title: What the VIP Club offers you
vip_club.benefits_subtitle: Join a caring community and give your pet the privilege of being part of a unique experience.
vip_club.ben_ateliers_desc: Sessions led by animal behaviour specialists, vets and wellness experts — to better understand and support your companion.
vip_club.ben_invitations_desc: Priority access to all our private events: member evenings, previews, VIP meetings with sector experts.
vip_club.ben_cadeaux_desc: Your pet is unique — so are our attentions. Personalised gift sets, birthday surprises for your pet and exclusive premium product selections.
vip_club.ben_rencontres_desc: Join a community of passionate owners. Regularly organised meetups to share, exchange and bond over the love of animals.
vip_club.ben_associations_desc: Representatives of associations committed to animal welfare speak at our events to raise awareness and act together.
vip_club.mission_p1: The VIP Club was born from a simple conviction: pet owners deserve a community equal to their commitment to their companions.
vip_club.mission_p2: More than a perks programme, it is a space where experts, charities and enthusiasts come together to advance the cause of animal wellbeing.
vip_club.mission_p3: Join the Very Important Pet Club today and give your pet the privilege of belonging to a caring community.
vip_club.banner_title: Ready to join the Very Important Pet Club?
vip_club.banner_subtitle: Contact us to find out more about membership and upcoming events.

entreprises.meta_title: Petcheri for Business — Corporate Pet Services
entreprises.meta_description: Pet-friendly office, workshops, employee services — Petcheri supports businesses in their animal wellness approach.
entreprises.hero_subtitle: 1 in 2 French employees owns a pet. Give them a premium pet concierge service — a tangible benefit that retains talent, attracts candidates and reduces stress at work.
entreprises.why_title: An HR investment with strong returns
entreprises.why_subtitle: Companies that integrate Petcheri as an employee benefit see increased engagement and reduced stress related to pet care.
entreprises.ben_users_desc: Retain talent by offering a premium service dedicated to their pets' wellbeing. A concrete, memorable benefit that makes the difference when recruiting.
entreprises.ben_shield_desc: Every service is covered by our AXA professional insurance. You offer peace of mind to your employees with no additional liability.
entreprises.ben_building_desc: Preferential access to our verified petsitter network. Tiered pricing based on your company size and specific needs.
entreprises.ben_headphones_desc: A single point of contact to manage employee access, service tracking and any special requests. Simple and effective.
entreprises.svcs_title: All Petcheri services for your teams
entreprises.svcs_subtitle: Your teams access the full Petcheri catalogue — with the negotiated rates of your corporate contract.
entreprises.svc_garde_desc: Home sitting, boarding, daily walks — your employees choose the option that suits them.
entreprises.svc_toilettage_desc: Bath, cut, care — available at home or at a salon near the office, according to preference.
entreprises.svc_comport_desc: Sessions with certified behaviourists to support education and animal wellbeing.
entreprises.svc_transport_desc: Trips to the vet, boarding or any journey — with trained drivers.
entreprises.svc_pension_desc: Verified host families or boarding for periods of business travel.
entreprises.svc_suivi_desc: Photos, walk reports, session updates — all communicated in real time via the app.
entreprises.how_subtitle: From contract signing to your employee's first booking — less than 48 hours.
entreprises.step_1_desc: A 30-minute conversation to understand your needs, team size and define the most suitable offer.
entreprises.step_2_desc: We create your company space on the Petcheri app within 48h. Your employees receive their access by email.
entreprises.step_3_desc: Each employee books their services independently. You keep control of budgets and reporting.
entreprises.trust_section_title: A solution trusted by hundreds of companies
entreprises.trust_section_subtitle: From startups to mid-sized companies, our business partners value the simplicity, reliability and real impact on team wellbeing.
entreprises.banner_title: Integrate Petcheri as an employee benefit
entreprises.banner_subtitle: Tell us about your company — we'll build the most suitable offer for your team together.

luxury_hotels.meta_description: Pet concierge for 4 and 5-star hotels — welcome service, sitting, walking, grooming for your guests' pets.
luxury_hotels.hero_subtitle: Your guests travel with their companions and expect the same level of excellence for them. Petcheri supports prestigious establishments with a turnkey pet concierge service, up to your standards.
luxury_hotels.hero_image_alt: Petcheri Luxury Hotels — prestige pet concierge
luxury_hotels.stat_1_label: travellers brings their pet on holiday
luxury_hotels.svcs_title: A complete service, in your image
luxury_hotels.svcs_subtitle: Three pillars to transform every pet-friendly stay into a palace experience — fully operated by Petcheri, under your identity if you wish.
luxury_hotels.svc_1_desc: Welcome your guests and their companions with a box designed to the last detail: personalised bowl in hotel colours, premium treats, care kit, welcome card and practical information on available services.
luxury_hotels.svc_2_desc: A complete menu of products and services integrated into your room service offering, under your brand. Premium snacks, accessories, walk bookings, grooming, transport — all operationally managed by Petcheri, discreetly.
luxury_hotels.svc_3_desc: Co-create memorable experiences for your guests: Pet Social Club, wellness workshops (shiatsu, brushing, massage), meetings with trainers, behaviourists and pet photographers. Moments that get people talking.
luxury_hotels.why_title: What sets us apart in luxury hospitality
luxury_hotels.why_subtitle: We are not a generalist platform. Petcheri is a premium pet concierge, built to meet the standards of luxury hospitality.
luxury_hotels.diff_1_desc: Every intervention by our petsitters is covered by professional insurance worth 9 million euros. Your establishment is protected, your guests reassured.
luxury_hotels.diff_2_desc: A Petcheri account manager is assigned to you from signing. They coordinate all services and respond to urgent requests from your teams within minutes.
luxury_hotels.diff_3_desc: Need a petsitter on site for an event, long-stay or regular clients? We provide certified professionals according to your schedules.
luxury_hotels.diff_4_desc: All our services can be offered under your establishment's identity. Your guests experience a coherent palace experience — from check-in to check-out.
luxury_hotels.how_subtitle: From our first conversation to welcoming your first guest with a pet — a fast, frictionless deployment for your teams.
luxury_hotels.how_1_desc: A conversation with our team to understand your establishment, your clientele and your service standards. We adapt every detail to your positioning.
luxury_hotels.how_2_desc: Creation of your bespoke welcome kit, services menu and intervention protocol — in your hotel's colours, within two weeks.
luxury_hotels.how_3_desc: From the first booking that includes a pet, the Petcheri protocol activates. Simple, discreet, impeccable — exactly at the level your establishment promises.
luxury_hotels.trust_section_title: A solution proven by the most demanding hotels
luxury_hotels.trust_section_subtitle: From Paris to the Côte d'Azur, our hotel partners value the rigour, discretion and impact on their guests' satisfaction.
luxury_hotels.card_desc: average rating on our hotel interventions
luxury_hotels.contact_strip_label: A question? Our team is here for you
luxury_hotels.banner_title: Give your guests — and their pets — the palace experience
luxury_hotels.banner_subtitle: Tell us about your establishment. In 30 minutes, we'll show you what Petcheri can bring to your pet-friendly offering.

devenir_petsitter.meta_description: Join {sittersNetwork}+ petsitters and exercise your passion for animals freely. Professional insurance included, training and community support.
devenir_petsitter.hero_subtitle: Love animals as much as we do? Join {sittersNetwork}+ petsitters who trust Petcheri to work in complete freedom, with professional insurance and the backing of an exacting team.
devenir_petsitter.avan_title: What you gain by joining the network
devenir_petsitter.avan_subtitle: Petcheri is not just a matchmaking platform. It is a premium network with high standards — and perks to match.
devenir_petsitter.avan_liberte_desc: You choose your availability, services and area. Petcheri adapts to your lifestyle.
devenir_petsitter.avan_assurance_desc: Every service is covered by our AXA insurance up to €9,000,000. You work with complete peace of mind.
devenir_petsitter.avan_communaute_desc: {sittersNetwork} petsitters across France, partner vets, behaviourists — a unique support network.
devenir_petsitter.avan_formation_desc: Access to training modules, webinars and exclusive resources to continuously develop your skills.
devenir_petsitter.avan_visibilite_desc: Leverage Petcheri's brand recognition (Purina, Pépites du Tech, Gala, Europe 1) to grow your business.
devenir_petsitter.avan_suivi_desc: A dedicated concierge supports you daily — from matching to quality follow-up, you are never alone.
devenir_petsitter.profils_subtitle: Our selection process is rigorous because our clients entrust us with what they hold most precious. Here are the profiles we seek.
devenir_petsitter.prof_passionnes_desc: Your love of animals is not just a hobby — it is a calling. We are looking for people like you.
devenir_petsitter.prof_pros_desc: Vet nurses, animal carers, behaviourists, trainers — your qualifications are a major asset.
devenir_petsitter.prof_reconversion_desc: Want to make your passion your career? We support transitions with training and follow-up.
devenir_petsitter.etapes_title: From application to your first assignment
devenir_petsitter.etapes_subtitle: A clear, human and fast process. From your application to your first assignments: allow under two weeks.
devenir_petsitter.etape_1_desc: Fill in the form in a few minutes — experience, availability, desired services. No CV required.
devenir_petsitter.etape_2_desc: A personal conversation with a Petcheri team member and a partner behaviourist to get to know you better.
devenir_petsitter.etape_3_desc: Skills test, reference check, signing the quality charter. Welcome to the Petcheri family.
devenir_petsitter.etape_4_desc: Your profile is live and visible to thousands of owners. Requests come in — you choose.
devenir_petsitter.temo_subtitle: {sittersNetwork} petsitters chose Petcheri to pursue their passion. Here is what they think after a few months.
devenir_petsitter.temo_main_quote: Joining Petcheri is the best decision I made for my career change. I have loyal clients, serious insurance and a team that always comes through.
devenir_petsitter.temo_1_quote: In 6 months I built a loyal client base. The Petcheri reputation opens doors.
devenir_petsitter.temo_2_quote: The application process is demanding, but that is exactly what gives the label its value.
devenir_petsitter.temo_3_quote: I work at my own pace, I choose my clients. I have never loved my job this much.
devenir_petsitter.banner_title: Ready to join France's best petsitters?
devenir_petsitter.banner_subtitle: The application takes 5 minutes. We handle the rest.

nos_bons_plans.meta_description: Exclusive offers from our handpicked partners: pet food, health, accessories, insurance and supplements for your pet.
nos_bons_plans.hero_subtitle: Exclusive offers from our handpicked partners — premium food, care, accessories, insurance and supplements for your pet's wellbeing.

vos_avis.meta_description: 4.9/5 on Google. Read what pet owners think about Petcheri — genuine reviews from hundreds of families.
vos_avis.hero_subtitle: Hundreds of families trust Petcheri every week. Here is what they think — unfiltered.
vos_avis.temo_title: They trusted us with their pet
vos_avis.temo_subtitle: Sitting, walks, grooming, behaviour… Every testimonial is a story of trust.
vos_avis.share_desc: Your review helps other owners find the ideal petsitter — and helps us maintain our standards.
vos_avis.banner_title: Join the families who trust us
vos_avis.banner_subtitle: 4.9/5 on Google. AXA insurance. Certified petsitters. Book your first service.

contact.meta_description: Contact our team by phone, email or form. Response guaranteed within 24 hours.
contact.hero_subtitle: Contact us for any questions about our services or general enquiries — we will be happy to help!
contact.app_cta_desc: Our app is available 7 days a week.
contact.form_subtitle: Your request will be processed as quickly as possible.
contact.form_ph_message: Describe your request, your pet, your needs…
contact.form_success_desc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

blog.meta_description: Advice on pet wellbeing, training, health and lifestyle. Expert content from Petcheri's team of vets and behaviourists.
blog.hero_subtitle: Expert advice, practical guides and inspiration for your pet's wellbeing — from our team of vets, behaviourists and enthusiasts.

garde_paris.hero_subtitle: Hand-picked certified petsitters in your neighbourhood. AXA insurance included, daily photo updates, available 7 days a week.
garde_paris.services_subtitle: All sitters are certified by our team. Numbers are updated regularly.
garde_paris.guarantees_subtitle: What sets us apart from standard pet-sitting platforms.
garde_paris.guarantee_matching_desc: Our team selects the right sitter for you — not an algorithm. Every match is carefully considered.
garde_paris.guarantee_certified_desc: Individual interview, reference checks, supervised trial. No self-declared profiles in our network.
garde_paris.guarantee_insurance_desc: Every service is covered by our AXA insurance. No optional add-ons, no surprises.
garde_paris.guarantee_tracking_desc: Daily photos, activity reports, WhatsApp 7/7. You always know what's happening in real time.
garde_paris.cta_subtitle: Tell us about your pet and dates — our team will find the perfect match in under 24 hours.

garde_ville.hero_subtitle: Certified petsitters, AXA insurance and personalised follow-up for your pet. Available 7 days a week.
garde_ville.services_subtitle: All our providers are vetted, insured and assessed by our teams.
garde_ville.svc_garde_sublabel: Day care, overnight stays or home boarding
garde_ville.svc_promenade_sublabel: Solo or group walks, city or forest
garde_ville.svc_visites_sublabel: Home visits for cats and exotic pets
garde_ville.svc_toilettage_sublabel: Mobile grooming or salon, spa treatments
garde_ville.guarantees_subtitle: Every provider is rigorously selected to ensure the well-being of your pet.
garde_ville.guarantee_matching_desc: We match you with the provider best suited to your pet's personality and your lifestyle.
garde_ville.guarantee_certified_desc: Every petsitter is vetted: home visit, references, basic care training.
garde_ville.guarantee_insurance_desc: Every service is covered by our AXA liability insurance at no extra cost.
garde_ville.guarantee_tracking_desc: Photos, visit reports and direct messaging with your petsitter from the app.
garde_ville.cta_subtitle: Book your first service in a few clicks. Matching guaranteed within 24 hours.

blog_post.cta_desc: Certified professionals matched to your pet's profile.
